metadata.description: Internal Moolabs development skills — adversarial PR review, grooming workflow, testing blueprints, feature-flag patterns, and architect/reviewer personas.

plugins.name: moo-skills
plugins.description: Adversarial PR review, grooming chain (requirements → HLD → contracts → BE/FE → task breakdown), frontend/backend unit + API testing blueprints, feature-flag patterns, Senior-Architect / Sparring-Partner / Design-Reviewer personas, and the cost-billing suite (finance → CPO → team-product → engineering four-stage chain).
